Panini Sticker Swap Platform

↗

Platform for FIFA World Cup 2026 Panini collectors to track sticker albums and find swap partners. Scaled to 2K+ users and 170K+ stickers tracked within weeks of launch.

Igre

↗

Platform for Bosnian language word puzzle games. Currently features Konekcije — a connections-style category puzzle.

Bosnian Dictionary Application

↗

OCR pipeline that converts a scanned PDF dictionary into a searchable web app — ~45K words and ~46K definitions — with a Next.js frontend and an admin dashboard for managing entries.

↗

Enterprise portal for portfolio management, cross-system integrations, and self-service workspace provisioning — built on event-driven architecture with full ownership across backend, DevOps, and infrastructure.

Supply Chain Digital Twin Platform

↗

Digital twin modelling supply chain dependencies with graph data via Neo4j, with re-engineered modular IaC using Terragrunt and multi-environment CI/CD.

Real-Time Supply Chain Operation Analytics

↗

ETL pipelines and high-concurrency web APIs processing 20M+ supply chain records, with refactored query logic and optimised delivery workflows across environments.

Insurance Administration System

Full-stack administration system for guaranteed income wrap insurance products, including a refactored legacy cost calculation engine and automated end-to-end pipeline execution.

MSG-Z

Discord bot for a Bosnian university faculty server automating student lifecycle management — registration, academic year progression, and news scraping from university platforms.
